## Executive Summary
JPMorgan Chase & Co. reports $182.4B in Revenue and $57.0B in Net Income for FY2025 FY2025 Revenue reached $182.4B.; Net Income reported at $57.0B with an EPS of $20.05.; Net Margin stood at a robust 31.3%.
